666 GG0170F2_TOILT_TRNSFR_GOAL_CD GG0170F2_TOILT_TRNSFR_GOAL_CD GG0170F2 Mobility: Toilet Transfer Goal by End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal to transfer on or off the toilet by the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay.
